_install_path: ~/.kiro/settings/cli.json  (global only — there is no project-scoped cli.json)
_doc: Starter cli.json. Verify keys against `kiro-cli help settings` on your installed version — schema evolves between releases.

autoApprove._doc: Auto-approves read-class tools (read, @git read-only ops). All write/shell/MCP calls still prompt.
